Twisting (wringing) [something] wet unti.action_anchor: A person twists a wet object with both hands until water drips out.
phase_cues: hands grip wet object
twist object tightly with two-hand squeeze
water drips from wet object

Poking a hole into [something soft].action_anchor: A finger pushes into a soft surface, creating a depression.
phase_cues: finger approaches soft surface
finger presses into soft surface, forming an elastic dent
finger withdraws, leaving a hole in soft body

Pretending to take [something] from [som.action_anchor: A person's hand moves toward [something] in [somewhere] without making contact.

hand hovers near [something] without touching
hand withdraws empty while target stays in place

Putting [something] upright on the table.action_anchor: A hand sets an object on a table so it stays upright.
phase_cues: hand carries object toward table
object base touches table before the hand lets go
object remains upright on the table surface
confusion_cues: placing object in container on table

Poking a hole into [some substance].action_anchor: A finger or tool pushes into a material mass and leaves a cavity.
phase_cues: tool approaches material mass
tool enters yielding substance and opens a cavity
tool retracts, leaving a cavity in the material mass

Rolling [something] on a flat surface.action_anchor: A hand pushes a cylindrical object forward, causing it to rotate while maintaining contact with a flat plane.
phase_cues: hand makes contact with object side
object begins rotating while staying supported on the flat surface
object continues rolling away while staying on flat surface

finger makes side contact and the stack loses stability

wrist twists object back and forth in place
